info.title: info: Obfuscar for .NET is available at https://www.obfuscar.com
info.description:
info: (C) 2007-2026, Ryan Williams and other contributors.
info:
info: Usage: obfuscar [Options] <project_file> [project_file...]
info:
info: Options:
info:   -v:<level>, --verbosity:<level>  Set verbosity level (q=quiet, m=minimal, n=normal, d=detailed, diag=diagnostic)
info:   -V, --version                   Display version information
info:   -h, --help                      Show help information
info:
